pages.text: $(bold)Specialist machines$(), each doing one job to an item beneath or beside it:$(br)$(li)$(bold)Mechanical Saw$() — cuts logs to planks, stone to slabs; mounted on a contraption it fells whole trees.$(li)$(bold)Deployer$() — 'uses' a held item or tool on the block/entity in front, like a mechanical hand.$(li)$(bold)Spout$() — fills items from a tank; $(bold)Item Drain$() empties them.
pages.title: Specialists

pages.text: $(bold)Automated crafting$() comes in two shapes:$(br)$(li)$(bold)Mechanical Crafters$() — a shaped grid that assembles a crafting recipe and spits out the result; used for the fancier Create blocks.$(li)$(bold)Sequenced Assembly$() — a looping line (press, then deploy, then fill…) that builds an item in ordered stages. Precision mechanisms and the like are made this way.
pages.title: Crafting Machines
